name: Jo Beers' Apricot Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried apricots for 20 minutes.
2. Cream together 1 cup sugar, shortening, and egg.
3. Combine 1/4 cup sugar and orange juice and stir into the above mixture.
4. Add dry ingredients; blend well. Mix in drained apricots and nuts.
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured loaf pan (8" x 4" x 3").
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 65 minutes or until done. This bread can be frozen after baking.
